projects.title: E-Commerce Platform
projects.description: A comprehensive full-stack e-commerce solution featuring real-time inventory management, secure payment integration with Stripe, admin dashboard with analytics, and responsive customer-facing storefront.

projects.title: SaaS Dashboard
projects.description: Analytics-driven SaaS dashboard with real-time data visualization, role-based access control, subscription billing management, and automated reporting features.

projects.title: AI Content Platform
projects.description: AI-powered content generation platform that helps developers create documentation, blog posts, and technical articles. Integrates with OpenAI API and provides a rich text editor.

projects.title: Real-time Collaboration Tool
projects.description: End-to-end encrypted collaboration platform featuring real-time document editing, voice/video calls via WebRTC, team workspaces, and granular permission controls.

projects.title: API Gateway Service
projects.description: Scalable API gateway built with microservices architecture, featuring rate limiting, request caching, authentication middleware, and comprehensive logging/monitoring.

projects.title: Mobile-First PWA
projects.description: Progressive web application delivering native-like mobile experience with offline support, push notifications, and smooth animations. Designed for performance on low-bandwidth networks.
